title: Wasp Removal in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn | $350 - $550
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal services in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, effective wasp nest elimination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for $350-$550 pricing.
intro: Dyker Heights homeowners know that wasps can turn backyard barbecues and garden time into dangerous situations, especially around the neighborhood's beautiful single-family homes and residential properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe wasp removal services throughout Dyker Heights, protecting families from painful stings and property damage. Our licensed technicians offer comprehensive wasp nest elimination with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on nest size and location.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Dyker Heights residents for years with specialized knowledge of Brooklyn's wasp species and nesting patterns. Our team uses eco-friendly removal methods that are safe for your family, pets, and the neighborhood's many gardens, and we guarantee complete nest elimination with follow-up protection to prevent re-infestation.
localContext: Dyker Heights' tree-lined streets, spacious yards, and proximity to Dyker Beach Park create ideal conditions for wasp colonies to thrive in eaves, attics, and outdoor structures. The neighborhood's mix of classic brick homes and well-maintained properties requires careful, professional wasp removal that protects both residents and the architectural beauty that makes this community famous, especially during the holiday season when the area attracts thousands of visitors.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal service throughout Dyker Heights. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size. We understand the urgency of wasp problems, especially during summer months when activity peaks, and prioritize emergency calls for nests near doorways or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 wasp removal price include?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest elimination, treatment of surrounding areas to prevent returns, safe disposal of the nest, and a 30-day warranty. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility (ground level vs. second story), and the wasp species involved. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are wasp removal treatments safe for my family and pets in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that minimize exposure to people and pets. Our technicians are trained to safely remove nests with minimal disruption to your household. We provide clear instructions for any temporary precautions needed during treatment, typically recommending staying indoors for 2-3 hours while we work, and the treated area is completely safe within 24 hours.

faqs.question: When is wasp season in Dyker Heights and when should I call for removal?
faqs.answer: Wasp activity in Dyker Heights peaks from late spring through early fall (May-October), with August and September being the most active months. Call immediately if you notice wasps entering and exiting a specific area repeatedly, as this indicates an active nest. Early removal is crucial—nests grow rapidly and wasps become more aggressive as colonies expand. Winter inspections can also identify dormant nests that should be removed before spring.
